system.Text:
When you **summon the darkness within you and leverage it to make minor alterations to an aspect** the dark power controls, choose one option below. Then envision how your character uses the power to:

* **Act:** You may @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.ironswornmoves.Item.be95ca063ded2b19]{Compel}, @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.ironswornmoves.Item.c8bacc17f73d3103]{Face Danger}, @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.ironswornmoves.Item.4244b77103f55bc4]{Gather Information}, @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.ironswornmoves.Item.4dd8468e095810a4]{Secure an Advantage}, @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.ironswornmoves.Item.5288e935906f6d28]{Strike} or  +darkness instead of the normal stat. If your action die shows a 1 on that move, mark darkness.
* **Interrupt:** After rolling for a move but before resolving the outcome, choose one:
    * Mark darkness to change a weak hit to a strong hit.
    * Mark darkness twice to change a miss to a weak hit.

* **Empower:** You may @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.ironswornmoves.Item.fdb51ee928b4fca2]{Endure Harm} or @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.ironswornmoves.Item.92b85c33a17ab487]{Face Death} +darkness instead of the normal stat. If your action die shows a 1 on that move, mark darkness.

Trigger.Text: When you summon the darkness within you and leverage it to make minor alterations to an aspect the dark power controls...
